name_en: P🆕【Premium Original】🔥【Exclusive Background】💋2026 Early Spring New Loulou Mini 20cm, soft lambskin, new lambskin has a glossy finish, comes with a detachable card holder and full-label vanity mirror, equipped with a sliding chain, can be worn on the shoulder or crossbody to meet multi-occasion needs! The new lambskin has been coated for extra durability and gloss, making the whole bag look exceptionally exquisite and beautiful❤
